title: Exide Industries Digital Technologies is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Exide Industries Digital Technologies is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Exide Industries Digital Technologies has an exciting opening for a Quality Control Engineer at our Ahmedabad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Exide Industries Digital Technologies:
Exide Industries Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in PPAP

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Exide Industries Digital Technologies!
